title: Indiana Jones Mod
description: This mod adds Indiana Jones gear, relics, and adventures
body:
**The Indiana Jones Mod**

Prepare to step into the thrilling world of **Indiana Jones**, where danger, mystery, and ancient treasures await around every corner. This mod brings the iconic spirit of the _Indiana Jones_ franchise into Minecraft, offering players an immersive experience filled with exploration, epic relics, and unique gear. With this mod, you’ll be able to equip yourself with Indiana Jones’s iconic tools and weapons as you embark on daring adventures to uncover long-lost artifacts. Whether it’s the classic fedora, a trusty revolver, or the legendary _Holy Grail_, each item adds a new layer of excitement to your journey. **What to Expect**: * **Adventure and Exploration**: Uncover hidden relics, from the Grail Diary to the Cross of Coronado, all while facing the perils of a dangerous world. * **Iconic Gear**: Equip yourself with Indy’s signature attire, including his leather jacket and bullwhip, bringing a whole new dynamic to your Minecraft experience. * **Engaging Combat and Tools**: Utilize a full set of tools and armor crafted from unique materials like Orichalcum, Copper, Silver, and Zinc, and face enemies with Indy’s weapons (functionalities coming soon). As the mod evolves, expect regular updates to expand the experience. Future content will include new locations, enemies, traps, and even more legendary treasures from the Indiana Jones universe, creating endless possibilities for adventure.   **Mod Requirements**: * [**Sown's Modding Framework**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sown): This mod requires the framework to function, so make sure it's installed to fully enjoy the features.  

Need a server to play with your friends? Don't know how to set one up? Just rent an already configured server!

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Arda_Addon/BH_AA_PROMOCODE.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=4120)Click on the picture above, select a plan(at least 4GB), use my code **sown** to get 25% off of your first month, and enjoy playing with your friends!

***

Legal Disclaimer: This mod is a fan creation and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Lucasfilm Ltd., Disney, or any associated properties. Indiana Jones and all related characters, imagery, and trademarks are the property of Lucasfilm Ltd. and Disney. This mod is intended solely for entertainment purposes and for fans to celebrate the Indiana Jones franchise.
